name: Garlic Coleslaw
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup plain yogurt (or use 1/2 cup sour cream)
Fresh ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage.
2. Press the garlic.
3. In a stainless or ceramic bowl, combine the shredded cabbage, pressed garlic (to taste), yogurt (or sour cream), rice vinegar, salt, sugar, and black pepper.
4. Toss until well mixed.
5. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
6. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for best results; it will be even better after a day or two.
